attr.title: Power Level
attr.desc: You have 5 minutes to explore a randomly generated dungeon and gear up for a tough boss fight. Search for treasure, upgrades, and that glorious EXP in this quick-paced action game!
attr.inst: Download Power Level v1.2.zip from https://smithmanc.itch.io/power-level, Place Power Level v1.2.zip into  /ports/powerlevel/assets.
attr.inst_md: Download Power Level v1.2.zip from [Itch.io](https://smithmanc.itch.io/power-level) and place it into /ports/powerlevel/assets.
